name: chess_llms_8layer
license_evidence: HF API cardData.license = None (no license tag). No LICENSE file in repo (404 on LICENSE/LICENSE.txt/LICENSE.md/license). README.md contains NO license statement (only dataset/training notes). The associated training repo github.com/adamkarvonen/train_ChessGPT IS MIT -- but that licenses the training CODE, not these weight checkpoints. The model-interpretability repo adamkarvonen/chess_gpt_interpretability has NO license. No permissive license attaches to the weights.
architecture: nanoGPT/minGPT chess model, 8 layers (~25M params), lichess-trained checkpoint dict (model state + metadata, no optimizer)
notes: Intended Platinum headliner (25M lichess ChessGPT). BLOCKED: weights carry NO permissive license. Fetched ONLY to measure size: raw checkpoint 102.88 MB; xz -9e of the raw .pt = 94.31 MB (compresses poorly -- fp32 weights + dict metadata). NO shippable quantized artifact produced. The MIT training-code repo does not relicense the published weights. To unblock, the model author would need to add an explicit permissive license tag to adamkarvonen/chess_llms. Until then: do not ship.
